creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:

New Revision: 324371
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/324371

Log:
  Add UIDs and GIDs for incoming multimedia/plexmediaserver

Modified:

  head/UIDs

Modified: head/GIDs

--- head/GIDs	Wed Aug  7 23:34:55 2013	(r324370)
+++ head/GIDs	Wed Aug  7 23:35:39 2013	(r324371)

 colord:*:970:
 shibd:*:971:
+plex:*:972:
 nogroup:*:65533:
 nobody:*:65534:

Modified: head/UIDs
==============================================================================

+++ head/UIDs	Wed Aug  7 23:35:39 2013	(r324371)

 kippo:*:969:969::0:0:kippo user:/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologin
 colord:*:970:970::0:0:colord color management daemon:/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologin

+plex:*:972:972::0:0:Plex Media Server:/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologin
 nobody:*:65534:65534::0:0:Unprivileged user:/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologin
